sections.paragraph: Jer 16:5, const. מִרְזַּח., Amo 6:7 (compare Lehrg. p. 578), i.q. Arab. رَزَحُ clamour, outcry, the lifting up of the voice, whether in rejoicing, Amos loc. cit., or in weeping, Jer. loc. cit.; compare مِرْزِيحُ endued with a loud voice. Medial words of the same kind are יָלַל and רָנַן.
